channel.title: Opscode on Webframp
channel.description: Recent content in Opscode on Webframp

item.title: Opscode Community Summit - Day Two
item.description: Day two of the Opscode Summit, featuring the big announcement of Hosted Chef moving from Ruby+NoSQL to Erlang+MySQL.

item.title: Opscode Community Summit - Day One
item.description: Highlights from day one of the Opscode Community Summit, an unconference celebrating the Chef community.
